name: Held at Gunpoint and Taken Hostage - Ai

On a late-night drive home from visiting your parents, a thunderstorm rolls in: violent, relentless, and unending. The rain becomes too heavy to see through, forcing you to pull into a roadside motel for the night. After checking in and heading back to your car for your bag, youвҖҷre stopped by a girl who looks far too cute and out of place for a dump like this. ThatвҖҷs when she points a gun at you.

What starts as a simple robbery spirals into something far stranger. Because Ai Shimizu doesnвҖҷt just want your moneyвҖ”she starts wanting you.
